headline: Nvidia And Cadence Deepen AI Chip Design Ties As Investors Weigh Upside
summary: Cadence Design Systems and Nvidia have expanded their collaboration to launch new agentic AI and AI accelerated semiconductor design solutions. The offerings are optimized for Nvidia Grace CPUs and Blackwell GPUs and are already adopted by major global customers, including Honda and Micron. The move reflects Nvidia’s push to extend its role beyond hardware into automated chip design workflows and broader AI infrastructure. For anyone tracking NasdaqGS:NVDA, this update sits at the...
